description: Meridian Holdings requires a consolidated financial statement workbook based on the financial statements of its subsidiaries (Alpha Inc, Beta Corp, and Gamma LLC), intercompany transactions, and prior year figures. Create a workbook at /home/ga/Documents/consolidated_financials.xlsx that includes a 'Consolidated' sheet using cell references for eliminations, a 'Financial_Ratios' sheet (Current Ratio, Quick Ratio, Debt-to-Equity Ratio, Gross Margin %, Operating Margin %, Net Margin %, ROE, and ROA), a 'Variance_Analysis' sheet with dollar and percentage comparisons to the prior year, and a 'Dashboard' sheet featuring a grouped bar chart comparing current and prior year Revenue, Gross Profit, Operating Income, and Net Income. The variance analysis must include conditional formatting to highlight favorable

metadata.data_source: Financial statement data based on real SEC EDGAR filing patterns for mid-cap holding companies
